name: chatgpt-markdown-copy-extension
description: Browser extension to copy ChatGPT and Gemini messages as Markdown

scripts.build: tsup extension/content.js extension/background.js extension/options.js extension/popup.js extension/id.js --format iife --minify --sourcemap --outDir dist && cp extension/manifest.json dist/ && cp -r extension/icons dist/ && cp -r extension/_locales dist/ && cp extension/options.html dist/ && cp extension/options.css dist/ && cp extension/popup.html dist/ && cp extension/popup.css dist/ && cp extension/i18n.js dist/ && cp extension/selectors.js dist/ && cp extension/markdown.js dist/ && mv dist/content.global.js dist/content.js && mv dist/background.global.js dist/background.js && mv dist/options.global.js dist/options.js && mv dist/popup.global.js dist/popup.js && mv dist/id.global.js dist/id.js
